publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-04-21 23:11:54 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Includes photographs, printing blocks, and glass negatives (1930s) of the hotel school and campus, and files from when Keithan was dean.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Received his B.S. from Cornell's School of Hotel Administration in 1950 and later served as acting dean of the school.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs, printing blocks, and glass negatives (1930s) of the hotel school and campus, and files from when Keithan was dean.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: William Keithan Papers, #28-1-4102. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Hotels.
Hotel management schools -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration

did.unittitle: SHA (School of Hotel Administration) - Cornell Industry Cooperative Program
Statler West Trumansburg Road IOOF Home
Minutes of Committee on Minimum Residency Requirement
SHA Minutes of Management Intern Committee
SHA Off Campus Work Study Program Guide
SHA Minutes of the MPS Student Organization Meeting
Sage Hall Office Layout and Guidebook
SHA - TRIAD Committee's Role, Scope and Authority
SHA - Curriculum Committee Report MPS Program
SHA - Minutes of Cornell Society of Hotelmen Committee
SHA - Student Faculty Committee Constitution, Minutes
SHA - Master of Professional Studies Program
SHA - Minutes of Area Coordinator's Meetings
SHA - Minutes of Graduate Faculty Meetings
SHA - Minutes of Graduate Faculty Meetings
SHA - Slides Ray and Millie Lugos Security Project
Council on Hotel, Restaurant - Institutional Education
SHA - Dean Robert Beck Correspondence with University Provosts
SHA - Dean Robert Beck Correspondence with University Presidents
SHA - James Eyster Assistant Dean for Academic Affairs Memos
SHA - Richard Penner Course Material HA 751 Project Development - Construction
SHA - Faculty and Staff Meeting Minutes
SHA - Faculty and Staff Meeting Minutes
SHA - Faculty Research Committee Meeting Minutes
SHA - Conference on Research in Fields Related to the Operation of Hotels
SHA - Western International Hotels, Richard Compton Correspondence
SHA - Sayles Research Report on New Food Techniques
Photos: Graduating classes - one includes MVR
Photos: Cooking Classes, Hotel Registration Desk
SHA - Art Taft Interview and Class Notes
SHA - Tom Pedulla and Skip Sack Interview
SHA - Interviews with Mullane, Canas, Holtzman, Brown
SHA - American Hotel and Motel Association History
SHA - Sources Used for History Done in 1990's
SHA - History of the School of Hotel Administration
SHA - Invitation to 50th Anniversary of Hotel School
SHA - Dedication of the Binenkorb Video and Computer Center Program
SHA - "Letters to Ed" - by Charles Sayles
Index cards listing of its graduates who served during WWII

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Scenes of campus, hotel school events, classes and graduates. Some of the images were by Troy and some were taken by Howard Meek, Dean of the Hotel School, on a round the world hotel visit tour

did.unittitle: Frank McKowne, secretary, vice-president of the Statler Co. – arriving at Willard Straight Hall for "Hotel Ezra Cornell"
Dean Meek and Lucius Boomer at Baker Dorms
J.J. Sullivan, Jr., Steward; F.J. Perry, Chef; H.V. Moon, Headwaiter of Hotel Ezra Cornell
